title: Right At Home-Midland Oasis with pool-billiards
tagline: Vacation home in Midland with private pool and kitchen

pets: 2 pets total (up to 50 lbs per pet)

houseRules.pets: Pets allowed: less than 23 kg per pet (limit 2 pets total)
additionalRules: For Extend Stays over 10 days The customer will be assessed an additional cleaning fee every 10 days for cleaning.
Pool has the option to be heated for an additional 100 a day per the duration of your stay and takes 18 hour notice to heat.

importantInfo: Extra-person charges may apply and vary depending on property policy
Government-issued photo identification and a credit card, debit card or cash deposit may be required at check-in for incidental charges
Special requests are subject to availability upon check-in and may incur additional charges; special requests cannot be guaranteed
On-site parties or group events are strictly prohibited
Host has indicated that there is a carbon monoxide detector on the property
Host has indicated that there is a smoke detector on the property

list.author: Stacy J.
list.content: This location was amazing and easy access to the loop, shopping and dining.

list.title: Great family spot
list.author: Eric L.
list.content: Great place for a family to relax. House had lots of room and pool is great!

list.title: Graduation Family in town
list.author: Gina S.
list.content: This house was a lot bigger than it looks from the pictures. Great place to have family stay. Everyone enjoyed the stay at the house.

list.title: Weekend celebration
list.author: Jodi P.
list.content: The house was plenty big for the group we had with us. We loved the pool table and pool outside! All the rooms and bathrooms were clean and big! We did find that the fridge/freezers did not stay very cold though. If we had a longer stay that could've been more of an issue. Owner was very accommodating in letting us check in early as well! Loved our stay there and family from out of town was very happy as well!

list.title: Visiting in Midland
list.author: Kittie A.
list.content: The size of the property was adequate for our family, it was well stocked with the essentials. There were some issues initially however the property manager handled all promptly. Overall my family thoroughly enjoyed the stay in Midland visiting with family in town.

list.title: An amazing house
list.author: Sarah Q.
list.content: The host was so great, reached out made sure we knew where things were, the house was so amazing, what a great BnB experience highly recommended, especially for a family. Thank you

list.title: Great stay
list.author: Bill H.
list.content: Great house

list.title: Great home!
list.author: Deanna L.
list.content: We had a great time at this home and really loved the pool! Beautiful home with plenty of beds and space! Was the perfect place for our group!

list.title: Nice home
list.author: Sheri B.
list.content: Nice home, nice neighborhood.

list.title: Weekend in Midland
list.author: juan C.
list.content: Property was very clean and Check-In and check out was easy. I will stay again!

list.title: Great stay!
list.author: Fernando S.
list.content: Everything was even better than expected. Loved this property. We will definitely be staying again in the future

list.title: Very nice and enjoyable experience
list.author: Maia V.
list.content: I was very glad that i had such a nice stay at this residance.

list.title: Great stay
list.author: Annalisa G.
list.content: Very nice, Clean property. Good communication.

list.title: Great home
list.author: Dana H.
list.content: Beautiful home. Well stocked. We enjoyed our stay.

list.title: Texas Tech Alumni
list.author: Joy F.
list.content: We had a great time, a perfect place to gather. The place was clean and the communication was great we would definitely stay again

list.title: Amazing home
list.author: Angela F.
list.content: We enjoyed our stay. House was so nice. Beds were comfortable. Kitchen was well stocked. The swimming pool was so clean and the outdoor patio and TV were great. The host was so nice and responded quickly.

list.title: Graduation Stay
list.author: Keslie L.
list.content: Perfect for the family to enjoy while celebrating a family graduate

list.title: 7 year old bday party
list.author: lindzy g.
list.content: We had a great time the pool was nice our family really enjoyed it there was plenty of room for everyone

list.title: Beautiful home
list.author: Kealy C.
list.content: Beautiful home the kids and I had a amazing time swimming wonderful place to getaway and spend quality time with your family

list.title: Great stay
list.author: Verified traveller
list.content: We really enjoyed the big house. We had everything we needed. Host was great. Great communication.

list.title: Lovely property
list.author: Angelique m.
list.content: The pictures and posting do not do the home justice, super cute home, very clean. Check in process was easy and location of the home to every where we needed to go was perfect. Will definitely be saving this listing for future visits to Midland! Thank you so much.

list.author: Esther
list.content: Great rental, would rent again. Very comfortable and plenty of room! Thank you!

list.title: Accommodating and Hospitable
list.author: Jack L C.
list.content: We were visiting our kids and grandkids in Midland. The property offered more than enough space for dining, leisure, and rest. The neighbor is friendly and located near shopping establishments and restaurants. Everything was clean and welcoming. We hope to return next year!

list.title: Amazing!
list.author: Socorro G.
list.content: Great place to stay! Steven was an amazing host and never skipped a beat. Very responsive to all our needs. The neighborhood was amazing and close to everything! We will definitely be renting from him again!

list.title: Perfect for gatherings
list.author: benjamin s.
list.content: My wife has a large family and there was plenty of room to entertain no matter how many wanted to come over.

host.name: STEVEN M PALMA
host.about: Full time property manager here to ensure you have a wonderful trip. Graduate of Texas A&M and travel enthusiast.
host.whyChoseProperty: Located in the Exclusive Saddle Cub South Addition just off of Loop 250

description: This home is located in saddle club north convenient access to both Loop 250 which includes all shopping surroundings restaurants and entertainment venues there is a pool for your enjoyment as well as a pool table to enjoy all the bedrooms have 50 inch TVs as well as one in the living room available seating for 22 inside as well as 15 outside this home is set up for both business and pleasure. should you need larger accommodations you can also book Santiago Dreams another four bedroom three bath home just two blocks away. Enjoy your stay. Our prices include all fees. No hidden fees.
